freshApply: DDL then full verification; appliedAt commits only with VALID
sameChecksumRecovery: verification-only when the physical schema is already complete
completeRerun: full re-verification and no duplicate DDL
crashRecovery: RECOVERING_INVALID_INDEX resumes the exact allowlisted concurrent-index phase
repeatedRepairFailure: A second allowlisted index-repair failure remains RECOVERING_INVALID_INDEX and a later same-checksum invocation resumes successfully.
historyLimitation: The reviewed canonical ledger has one current-state row and no attempt counter. Same-checksum recovery overwrites that current state, and a later verification failure clears appliedAt. The known first failure is preserved only in failure-baseline.json; a durable generic attempt history requires a separately approved additive schema artifact. This remains a Gate M blocker.
